Title: State Council Document No. [1979] 63
Subject: Shenzhen establishment
Description: In March 1979, the State Council issued Document No. [1979] 63, officially establishing Shenzhen Municipality. This marked the legal starting point for Shenzhen¡¯s transformation from a small border town into a modern city and laid the foundation for its designation as China¡¯s first Special Economic Zone.
Creator: State Council of the People's Republic of China
Publisher: State Council of the People's Republic of China
Rights: Public Domain (Copyright Law of the PRC, Article 5)

Title: Time is Money; Efficiency is Life Slogan
Subject: Reform and opening-up slogan
Description: In 1982, the slogan "Time is money, efficiency is life" was proposed in Shenzhen. This iconic phrase broke ideological barriers and became the spiritual symbol of China¡¯s reform and opening-up era, driving the city¡¯s rapid industrialization.
Creator: Shenzhen Municipal Government

Title: Guomao Building (International Trade Centre)
Subject: Skyscraper
Description: Construction of the Guomao Building began in 1982 and was completed in just 37 months by 1985. Known as "Shenzhen Speed", it became China¡¯s tallest building at the time and a national symbol of the city¡¯s rapid development in the early reform era.
Creator: Shenzhen Construction Team

Title: Shenzhen Stock Exchange Launch
Subject: Financial market
Description: The Shenzhen Stock Exchange was formally launched in 1990. It established Shenzhen as a national financial center and created China¡¯s second major capital market, accelerating the city¡¯s shift from manufacturing to modern finance.
Creator: Shenzhen Municipal Government

Title: Shenzhen Bao¡¯an International Airport Opening
Subject: Aviation infrastructure
Description: Shenzhen Bao¡¯an International Airport opened in 1991. This new aviation hub greatly improved the city¡¯s global connectivity and supported its rapid economic integration with Hong Kong and the international market.
Creator: Shenzhen Airport Authority

Title: Shun Hing Square (Di Wang Tower)
Subject: Skyscraper
Description: Shun Hing Square (Di Wang Tower) was completed in 1996 at 384 meters. It became China¡¯s tallest building at the time and symbolized Shenzhen¡¯s economic rise while defining the Luohu Central Business District.
Creator: Zhang Yuanbai

Title: Hong Kong Handover Ceremony (1997)
Subject: Hong Kong handover
Description: On 1 July 1997, Hong Kong was handed over to China under "One Country, Two Systems". The smooth transition greatly boosted international confidence in Shenzhen, strengthening its role as the mainland¡¯s gateway to global capital and investment.
Creator: Xinhua News Agency

Title: First China Hi-Tech Fair (CHTF)
Subject: Technology exhibition
Description: The first China Hi-Tech Fair was held in Shenzhen in 1999. It established the city as a national platform for technology exchange and innovation, attracting capital and startups while building Shenzhen¡¯s reputation as a tech hub.
Creator: Shenzhen Municipal Government

Title: Shenzhen University Town Founding
Subject: Higher education
Description: Shenzhen University Town was founded in 2000. It attracted top universities and research institutes, creating a strong local higher-education and R&D base that supported the city¡¯s transition into a knowledge economy.
Creator: Shenzhen Municipal Government

Title: Shenzhen Metro Line 1 Opening
Subject: Urban transport
Description: Shenzhen Metro Line 1 opened in 2004. This marked the beginning of the city¡¯s modern rail transit era and formed the backbone of its urban transportation network.
Creator: Shenzhen Metro Group

Title: DJI (Da-Jiang Innovations) Founding
Subject: Drone innovation
Description: DJI was founded in a small apartment in Shenzhen in 2006. The company grew into the global leader in drones, establishing Shenzhen¡¯s worldwide reputation for hardware innovation and entrepreneurship.
Creator: DJI Technology Co., Ltd.

Title: SEZ Expansion to Entire City (2010)
Subject: Urban planning
Description: In 2010, the Special Economic Zone was expanded to cover the entire city (from 395 km? to 1,953 km?). This major policy change enabled unified urban planning and city-wide integrated development.
Creator: Shenzhen Municipal Government

Title: Kingkey 100 Completion
Subject: Skyscraper
Description: Kingkey 100 (441.8 m) was completed in 2011. It became a landmark of Futian CBD and demonstrated Shenzhen¡¯s growing financial and economic strength.
Creator: Kingkey Group

Title: Ping An Finance Center Topping Out
Subject: Skyscraper
Description: Ping An Finance Center (599.1 m) was topped out in 2014. It became Shenzhen¡¯s new skyline icon and significantly enhanced the city¡¯s global image as a modern metropolis.
Creator: Ping An Insurance

Title: Intelligent Connected Vehicles Regulation
Subject: Autonomous driving regulation
Description: Shenzhen issued China¡¯s first local regulation on Intelligent Connected Vehicles in 2023. It pioneered autonomous driving legislation and positioned the city as a global leader in future mobility industries.
Creator: Shenzhen Municipal Justice Bureau

Title: Shenzhen-Zhongshan Link Opening
Subject: Infrastructure
Description: The Shenzhen-Zhongshan Link opened in June 2024. This 24 km mega-bridge strengthened connectivity with western Guangdong and accelerated integration within the Greater Bay Area.
Creator: Shenzhen Municipal Government

Title: Qianhai Huafa Ice & Snow World Opening
Subject: Tourism & culture
Description: Qianhai Huafa Ice & Snow World (430,000 m?) officially opened in September 2025. As the world¡¯s largest indoor ski resort at the lowest latitude, it became a major cultural and tourism landmark, significantly upgrading Shenzhen¡¯s urban service functions.
Creator: Huafa Group
